title: Pauletia pulchella
taxonomy: Pauletia pulchella is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Pauletia and is native to tropical regions. The classification of Pauletia pulchella is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, phylum - Magnoliophyta, class - Magnoliopsida, order - Gentianales, family - Rubiaceae, genus - Pauletia, species - P. pulchella.
